commit_message:
Revert Swapped Clocks and Fix PLL Revert Swapped Clocks and Fix PLL The clocks were swapped because the IP Megafunction Wizard wasn't used. This caused the timing violations.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16388068/174191835-5ccfabe7-0415-420c-8632-e768dd81ad02.png)

This resolves the timing requirements issue.

Note line 73 of rtl/pll.qip below, I think that was the source of the problem.

[Comparison of before @retrorepair's change and after this pull request](http

examples.patch:
@@ -30,10 +30,10 @@ module  pll_0002(
 		.pll_dsm_out_sel("1st_order"),
 		.operation_mode("direct"),
 		.number_of_clocks(2),
-		.output_clock_frequency0("53.693175 MHz"),
+		.output_clock_frequency0("107.386350 MHz"),
 		.phase_shift0("0 ps"),
 		.duty_cycle0(50),
-		.output_clock_frequency1("107.386350 MHz"),
+		.output_clock_frequency1("53.693175 MHz"),
 		.phase_shift1("0 ps"),
 		.duty_cycle1(50),
 		.output_clock_frequency2("0 MHz"),
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ module  pll_0002(
 		.output_clock_frequency17("0 MHz"),
 		.phase_shift17("0 ps"),
 		.duty_cycle17(50),
-.pll_type("Cyclone V"),
+		.pll_type("Cyclone V"),
 		.pll_subtype("Reconfigurable"),
 		.m_cnt_hi_div(4),
 		.m_cnt_lo_div(4),
@@ -94,15 +94,15 @@ module  pll_0002(
 		.n_cnt_bypass_en("true"),
 		.m_cnt_odd_div_duty_en("false"),
 		.n_cnt_odd_div_duty_en("false"),
-		.c_cnt_hi_div0(4),
-		.c_cnt_lo_div0(4),
+		.c_cnt_hi_div0(2),
+		.c_cnt_lo_div0(2),
 		.c_cnt_prst0(1),
 		.c_cnt_ph_mux_prst0(0),
 		.c_cnt_in_src0("ph_mux_clk"),
 		.c_cnt_bypass_en0("false"),
 		.c_cnt_odd_div_duty_en0("false"),
-		.c_cnt_hi_div1(2),
-		.c_cnt_lo_div1(2),
+		.c_cnt_hi_div1(4),
+		.c_cnt_lo_div1(4),
 		.c_cnt_prst1(1),
 		.c_cnt_ph_mux_prst1(0),
 		.c_cnt_in_src1("ph_mux_clk"),
@@ -234,7 +234,7 @@ module  pll_0002(
 		.rst	(rst),
 		.outclk	({outclk_1, outclk_0}),
 		.locked	(locked),
-		.reconfig_to_pll (reconfig_to_pll),
+		.reconfig_to_pll	(reconfig_to_pll),
 		.fboutclk	( ),
 		.fbclk	(1'b0),
 		.refclk	(refclk),

	// interface 'reset'
	input wire rst,

	output wire [63:0] reconfig_from_pll

		.fractional_vco_multiplier("true"),
